prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for benzaldehyde computed at DFT, tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0/multiplicity 1 for the neutral (charge +1/mult 2 for cation; charge −1/mult 2 for anion). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, single-point (not re-optimized). Partial charges scheme: Mulliken (PySCF). All SCF calculations converged; integrity checks passed (trustworthy: true); sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000. No warnings reported by the engine.

Headline result (most electrophilic site): atom 3 (ring carbon adjacent to aldehyde), f+ = 0.39938965.
Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (carbonyl oxygen), f− = 0.23839906.
